props.name: block
props.description: If `true`, the button will take the full width of its container.

props.name: compact
props.description: Reduces the horizontal padding to make the button more compact.

props.name: fill
props.description: Fill specifies the desired shape of the button.

props.name: inputAlignment
props.description: If `true`, the button will have adjusted padding to align with input fields.

props.name: intent
props.description: Specifies the button's purpose class and affects its color palette.

props.name: loading
props.description: If `true`, the button will show a loading spinner.

props.name: loadingText
props.description: The text to show while loading.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the button.

props.name: spinner
props.description: The spinner to show while loading.

props.name: spinnerPlacement
props.description: The placement of the spinner

props.name: align
props.description: The `alignItems` style property

props.name: disabled
props.description: If `true`, the checkbox group is disabled

props.name: invalid
props.description: If `true`, the checkbox group is invalid

props.name: name

The name of the input fields in the checkbox group

props.name: value

props.name: asChild
props.description: Use the provided child element as the default rendered element, combining their props and behavior.

props.name: checked
props.description: The controlled checked state of the checkbox

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description:
The initial checked state of the checkbox when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the checked state of the checkbox.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the checkbox is disabled

props.name: form
props.description: The id of the form that the checkbox belongs to.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the machine.

props.name: ids
props.description: The ids of the elements in the checkbox. Useful for composition.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Whether the checkbox is invalid

props.name: name
props.description:
The name of the input field in a checkbox.
Useful for form submission.

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: The callback invoked when the checked state changes.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the checkbox is read-only

props.name: required
props.description: Whether the checkbox is required

props.name: value
props.description: The value of checkbox input. Useful for form submission.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the checkmark is checked

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the checkmark is disabled

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Whether the checkmark is indeterminate

props.description: Fill specifies the desired shape of the button.

props.name: description
props.description: Additional description text displayed below the title.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional custom icon.

props.name: isClosable
props.description: If `true`, displays a close button.

props.name: isLoading

props.name: title

props.name: asChild
props.description: Use the provided child element as the default rendered element, combining their props and behavior.

props.name: closeOnSelect
props.description:
Whether the calendar should close after the date selection is complete.
This is ignored when the selection mode is `multiple`.

props.name: defaultFocusedValue
props.description:
The initial focused date when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the focused date of the date picker.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description:
The initial open state of the date picker when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the open state of the date picker.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description:
The initial selected date(s) when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the selected date(s) of the date picker.

props.name: defaultView
props.description: The default view of the calendar

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the calendar is disabled.

props.name: focusedValue
props.description: The controlled focused date.

props.name: format
props.description: The format of the date to display in the input.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the machine.

props.name: ids
props.description: The ids of the elements in the date picker. Useful for composition.

props.name: immediate
props.description: Whether to synchronize the present change immediately or defer it to the next frame

props.name: invalid
props.description: Whether the date picker is invalid

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Returns whether a date of the calendar is available.

props.name: lazyMount
props.description: Whether to enable lazy mounting

props.name: locale
props.description: The locale (BCP 47 language tag) to use when formatting the date.

props.name: max
props.description: The maximum date that can be selected.

props.name: maxView
props.description: The maximum view of the calendar

props.name: min
props.description: The minimum date that can be selected.

props.name: minView
props.description: The minimum view of the calendar

props.name: name
props.description: The `name` attribute of the input element.

props.name: numOfMonths
props.description: The number of months to display.

props.name: onExitComplete
props.description: Function called when the animation ends in the closed state

props.name: onFocusChange
props.description: Function called when the focused date changes.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Function called when the calendar opens or closes.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Function called when the value changes.

props.name: onViewChange
props.description: Function called when the view changes.

props.name: open
props.description: The controlled open state of the date picker

props.name: outsideDaySelectable
props.description: Whether day outside the visible range can be selected.

props.name: parse
props.description: Function to parse the date from the input back to a DateValue.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: The placeholder text to display in the input.

props.name: positioning
props.description: The user provided options used to position the date picker content

props.name: present
props.description: Whether the node is present (controlled by the user)

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the calendar is read-only.

props.name: required
props.description: Whether the date picker is required

props.name: selectionMode
props.description:
The selection mode of the calendar.
- `single` - only one date can be selected
- `multiple` - multiple dates can be selected
- `range` - a range of dates can be selected

props.name: skipAnimationOnMount
props.description: Whether to allow the initial presence animation.

props.name: startOfWeek
props.description:
The first day of the week.
 `0` - Sunday
 `1` - Monday
 `2` - Tuesday
 `3` - Wednesday
 `4` - Thursday
 `5` - Friday
 `6` - Saturday

props.name: timeZone
props.description: The time zone to use

props.name: translations
props.description: The localized messages to use.

props.name: unmountOnExit
props.description: Whether to unmount on exit.

props.name: value
props.description: The controlled selected date(s).

props.name: view
props.description: The view of the calendar

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Human readable label for the dialog, in event the dialog title is not rendered

props.name: backdropProps

typeInfo.expanded:
export interface DialogBackdropProps
  extends HTMLChakraProps<'div', ArkDialog.BackdropBaseProps>, UnstyledProp {}

props.description: Props forwarded to the auto-injected `<Dialog.Backdrop>`.

props.name: children
props.description: Dialog body (auto-wrapped in `<Dialog.Content>`).

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Whether to close the dialog when the escape key is pressed

props.name: closeOnInteractOutside
props.description: Whether to close the dialog when the outside is clicked

props.name: contentProps

typeInfo.expanded:
export interface DialogContentProps
  extends
    HTMLChakraProps<'section', ArkDialog.ContentBaseProps>,
    UnstyledProp {}

props.description: Props forwarded to the auto-injected `<Dialog.Content>`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description:
The initial open state of the dialog when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the open state of the dialog.

props.name: finalFocusEl
props.description: Element to receive focus when the dialog is closed

props.name: hideBackdrop
props.description: If `true`, the backdrop is not rendered.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the machine.

props.name: ids
props.description: The ids of the elements in the dialog. Useful for composition.

props.name: immediate
props.description: Whether to synchronize the present change immediately or defer it to the next frame

props.name: initialFocusEl
props.description: Element to receive focus when the dialog is opened

props.name: lazyMount
props.description: Whether to enable lazy mounting

props.name: modal
props.description: Whether to prevent pointer interaction outside the element and hide all content below it

props.name: onEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Function called when the escape key is pressed

props.name: onExitComplete
props.description: Function called when the animation ends in the closed state

props.name: onFocusOutside
props.description: Function called when the focus is moved outside the component

props.name: onInteractOutside
props.description: Function called when an interaction happens outside the component

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Function to call when the dialog's open state changes

props.name: onPointerDownOutside
props.description: Function called when the pointer is pressed down outside the component

props.name: onRequestDismiss
props.description: Function called when this layer is closed due to a parent layer being closed

props.name: open
props.description: The controlled open state of the dialog

props.name: persistentElements
props.description:
Returns the persistent elements that:
- should not have pointer-events disabled
- should not trigger the dismiss event

props.name: present
props.description: Whether the node is present (controlled by the user)

props.name: preventScroll
props.description: Whether to prevent scrolling behind the dialog when it's opened

props.name: restoreFocus
props.description: Whether to restore focus to the element that had focus before the dialog was opened

props.name: role
props.description: The dialog's role

props.name: skipAnimationOnMount
props.description: Whether to allow the initial presence animation.

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: Whether to trap focus inside the dialog when it's opened

props.name: trigger
props.description: Convenience: element wrapped in `<Dialog.Trigger asChild>`.

props.name: unmountOnExit
props.description: Whether to unmount on exit.

props.name: anchorRef
props.description:
Imperative anchor element. When set, no `<Popover.Trigger>` is
rendered; the popover positions itself against the ref.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description:
Whether to automatically set focus on the first focusable
content within the popover when opened.

props.name: children
props.description: Popover body (auto-wrapped in `<Popover.Content>`).

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Whether to close the popover when the escape key is pressed.

props.name: closeOnInteractOutside
props.description: Whether to close the popover when the user clicks outside of the popover.

props.name: contentProps

typeInfo.expanded:
export interface PopoverContentProps
  extends HTMLChakraProps<'div', ArkPopover.ContentBaseProps>, UnstyledProp {}

props.description: Forwarded to the auto-injected `<Popover.Content>`.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description:
The initial open state of the popover when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the open state of the popover.

props.name: gutter
props.description:
Distance-from-anchor shortcut (px). Feeds `positioning.gutter`. A
user-supplied `positioning.gutter` wins on conflict.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the machine.

props.name: ids
props.description: The ids of the elements in the popover. Useful for composition.

props.name: immediate
props.description: Whether to synchronize the present change immediately or defer it to the next frame

props.name: initialFocusEl
props.description: The element to focus on when the popover is opened.

props.name: lazyMount
props.description: Whether to enable lazy mounting

props.name: modal
props.description:
Whether the popover should be modal. When set to `true`:
- interaction with outside elements will be disabled
- only popover content will be visible to screen readers
- scrolling is blocked
- focus is trapped within the popover

props.name: onEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Function called when the escape key is pressed

props.name: onExitComplete
props.description: Function called when the animation ends in the closed state

props.name: onFocusOutside
props.description: Function called when the focus is moved outside the component

props.name: onInteractOutside
props.description: Function called when an interaction happens outside the component

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Function invoked when the popover opens or closes

props.name: onPointerDownOutside
props.description: Function called when the pointer is pressed down outside the component

props.name: onRequestDismiss
props.description: Function called when this layer is closed due to a parent layer being closed

props.name: open
props.description: The controlled open state of the popover

props.name: persistentElements
props.description:
Returns the persistent elements that:
- should not have pointer-events disabled
- should not trigger the dismiss event

props.name: placement
props.description:
Placement shortcut. Feeds `positioning.placement`. A user-supplied
`positioning.placement` wins on conflict.

props.name: portalled
props.description: Render content in a Portal. Default `true`.

props.name: portalRef
props.description: Target container for the Portal.

props.name: positioning
props.description: Full Chakra positioning config. Overrides flat shortcuts.

props.name: present
props.description: Whether the node is present (controlled by the user)

props.name: showArrow
props.description: Render an arrow.

props.name: skipAnimationOnMount
props.description: Whether to allow the initial presence animation.

props.name: trigger
props.description:
Convenience: element wrapped in `<Popover.Trigger asChild>`. Ignored
when `anchorRef` is provided.

props.name: unmountOnExit
props.description: Whether to unmount on exit.

props.name: centerContent
props.description: If `true`, center the content horizontally

props.name: fluid
props.description: If `true`, the container will take the full width of its parent

props.name: asChild
props.description: Use the provided child element as the default rendered element, combining their props and behavior.

props.name: closeOnSelect

Whether the calendar should close after the date selection is complete.

props.name: skip

props.name: wrap
props.description: The `flexWrap` style property

props.name: fill
props.description: Fill specifies the desired shape of the button.

props.name: intent
props.description: Specifies the button's purpose class and affects its color palette.

props.name: loading
props.description: If `true`, the button will show a loading spinner.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the button.

props.name: spinner
props.description: The spinner to show while loading.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description:
Whether to automatically set focus on the first focusable
content within the popover when opened.

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Whether to close the popover when the escape key is pressed.

props.name: closeOnInteractOutside
props.description: Whether to close the popover when the user clicks outside of the popover.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description:
The initial open state of the popover when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the open state of the popover.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the machine.

props.name: ids
props.description: The ids of the elements in the popover. Useful for composition.

props.name: immediate
props.description: Whether to synchronize the present change immediately or defer it to the next frame

props.name: initialFocusEl
props.description: The element to focus on when the popover is opened.

props.name: lazyMount
props.description: Whether to enable lazy mounting

props.name: modal
props.description:
Whether the popover should be modal. When set to `true`:
- interaction with outside elements will be disabled
- only popover content will be visible to screen readers
- scrolling is blocked
- focus is trapped within the popover

props.name: onEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Function called when the escape key is pressed

props.name: onExitComplete
props.description: Function called when the animation ends in the closed state

props.name: onFocusOutside
props.description: Function called when the focus is moved outside the component

props.name: onInteractOutside
props.description: Function called when an interaction happens outside the component

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Function invoked when the popover opens or closes

props.name: onPointerDownOutside
props.description: Function called when the pointer is pressed down outside the component

props.name: onRequestDismiss
props.description: Function called when this layer is closed due to a parent layer being closed

props.name: open
props.description: The controlled open state of the popover

props.name: persistentElements
props.description:
Returns the persistent elements that:
- should not have pointer-events disabled
- should not trigger the dismiss event

props.name: portalled
props.description:
Whether the popover is portalled. This will proxy the tabbing behavior regardless of the DOM position
of the popover content.

props.name: positioning
props.description: The user provided options used to position the popover content

props.name: present
props.description: Whether the node is present (controlled by the user)

props.name: skipAnimationOnMount
props.description: Whether to allow the initial presence animation.

props.name: unmountOnExit
props.description: Whether to unmount on exit.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Use the provided child element as the default rendered element, combining their props and behavior.

props.description: The width at which child elements will break into columns. Pass a number for pixel values or a string for any other valid CSS length.

props.description: Whether the tooltip should close on scroll

typeInfo.expanded:
export interface TooltipContentProps
  extends HTMLChakraProps<'section', ArkTooltip.ContentProps>, UnstyledProp {}

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description:
The initial open state of the tooltip when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the open state of the tooltip.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the tooltip is disabled

props.name: gutter
props.description: Distance-from-anchor shortcut (px). Feeds `positioning.gutter`.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the machine.

props.name: ids
props.description: The ids of the elements in the tooltip. Useful for composition.

props.name: immediate
props.description: Whether to synchronize the present change immediately or defer it to the next frame

props.name: interactive
props.description:
Whether the tooltip's content is interactive.
In this mode, the tooltip will remain open when user hovers over the content.

props.name: lazyMount
props.description: Whether to enable lazy mounting

props.name: onExitComplete
props.description: Function called when the animation ends in the closed state

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Function called when the tooltip is opened.

props.name: open
props.description: The controlled open state of the tooltip

props.name: openDelay
props.description: The open delay of the tooltip.

props.name: placement
props.description:
Placement shortcut. Feeds `positioning.placement`. A user-supplied
`positioning.placement` wins on conflict.

props.name: positioning
props.description: Full Chakra positioning config. Overrides flat shortcuts.

props.name: present
props.description: Whether the node is present (controlled by the user)

props.name: skipAnimationOnMount
props.description: Whether to allow the initial presence animation.

props.name: unmountOnExit
props.description: Whether to unmount on exit.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Human readable label for the dialog, in event the dialog title is not rendered

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Whether to close the dialog when the escape key is pressed

props.name: closeOnInteractOutside
props.description: Whether to close the dialog when the outside is clicked

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description:
The initial open state of the dialog when rendered.
Use when you don't need to control the open state of the dialog.

props.name: finalFocusEl
props.description: Element to receive focus when the dialog is closed

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the machine.

props.name: ids
props.description: The ids of the elements in the dialog. Useful for composition.

props.name: initialFocusEl
props.description: Element to receive focus when the dialog is opened

props.name: modal
props.description: Whether to prevent pointer interaction outside the element and hide all content below it

props.name: onEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Function called when the escape key is pressed

props.name: onFocusOutside
props.description: Function called when the focus is moved outside the component

props.name: onInteractOutside
props.description: Function called when an interaction happens outside the component

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Function to call when the dialog's open state changes

props.name: onPointerDownOutside
props.description: Function called when the pointer is pressed down outside the component

props.name: onRequestDismiss
props.description: Function called when this layer is closed due to a parent layer being closed

props.name: open
props.description: The controlled open state of the dialog

props.name: persistentElements
props.description:
Returns the persistent elements that:
- should not have pointer-events disabled
- should not trigger the dismiss event

props.name: preventScroll
props.description: Whether to prevent scrolling behind the dialog when it's opened

props.name: restoreFocus
props.description: Whether to restore focus to the element that had focus before the dialog was opened

props.name: role
props.description: The dialog's role

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: Whether to trap focus inside the dialog when it's opened
